title: Luffy and Zoro Refuse to Fight
description: Luffy and Zoro refuse to fight back when Bellamy’s crew humiliates them, choosing their convictions over a pointless brawl.
scene: Across pages 13, 14, 15, 16, this scene centers on Bellamy, Nami, Sarquiss, Mock Town pirate, Luffy. Luffy and Zoro refuse to fight back when Bellamy’s crew humiliates them, choosing their convictions over a pointless brawl.

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: But still... 30 million for that pipsqueak?

dialogue.speaker: Sarquiss
dialogue.text: Is a town built from pirate-money.

dialogue.speaker: Mock Town pirate
dialogue.text: Fights and killings are everyday occurrences here,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Actually, make that 52 pieces of meat.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Know what, give me 53 cherry pies.

summary: Luffy and Zoro refuse to fight back when Bellamy’s crew humiliates them, choosing their convictions over a pointless brawl.
